Our Story

Built on one counter in Sheragada. Trading well beyond it.

Sarthak Trading started as a single chocolate shop on Padhi Street — and stayed exact about one thing: never let quality slip, no matter the order size.

That reputation is the reason retailers now come to us for their stock, not just customers for their sweets. We hold a tight range of milk chocolate, confectionery and festive gifting lines, and we buy them the same careful way we always have — checked for freshness, checked for finish, before a single case leaves the counter.

We keep the business small enough to answer the phone ourselves and large enough to fill a genuine bulk order on schedule. For a shop owner in Sheragada or a buyer further out in Odisha, that combination is the whole pitch.

Buyer NoteVerified Google Review

"I was genuinely impressed by the rich flavour and consistent quality of the chocolate here — a proper sweet indulgence in the heart of Sheragada."

Aryan Tripathi Customer, Sheragada

The range we trade in.

Four core lines, kept simple on purpose — depth within each, rather than a catalogue too wide to stand behind.

LOT · CHOC.01

Milk & Dairy Chocolate Bars

Everyday milk chocolate bars in the formats your counter already sells fastest — kept in stock, not back-ordered.

Pack formatsSingle / multipack
Order lead timeSame week
LOT · CONF.02

Assorted Confectionery

Toffees, candies and mixed sweet counters for shops that need variety without opening ten separate supplier accounts.

Pack formatsJar / bulk case
Order lead timeSame week
LOT · GIFT.03

Festive Gifting Packs

Boxed and hamper-ready chocolate for Rakhi, Puja and wedding season — the order every retailer over-thinks until it's late.

Pack formatsBox / hamper
Order lead timeAdvance booking
LOT · HORE.04

Hospitality & Bulk Supply

Standing supply arrangements for hotels, caterers and event businesses that need the same chocolate line, order after order.

Pack formatsCustom bulk
Order lead timeRecurring schedule

Why retailers stay with us.

Not the biggest trading house in Odisha — the one that answers, checks the stock, and delivers what it promised.

QUALITY

Sourced, not just stocked

Every batch is checked at the counter before it's offered for bulk sale — the same standard that earned the shop its name locally.

RELIABILITY

Orders that arrive on time

We commit to a delivery window before you confirm the order, and we hold ourselves to it — no vague "this week or next."

PRICING

Straight bulk pricing

One quote, tiered by volume, no renegotiating each time you reorder. What changes is quantity — not the number per case.

LOCAL

Odisha market knowledge

We know what sells in Sheragada and the surrounding markets, and can advise a new retailer on range before they overcommit.

Placing a wholesale order.

Five steps, start to reorder — no account minimums or paperwork beyond what a real invoice needs.

01

Enquiry

Tell us what you sell and the volume you're moving — by phone, form or in person at the counter on Padhi Street.

02

Sample & quote

We confirm stock and share a tiered price by volume, with a sample available for first-time buyers.

03

Order confirmation

You confirm quantity and delivery date; we lock the batch aside so it isn't sold through before dispatch.

04

Dispatch or pickup

Collect in-store or arrange delivery — either way, the order goes out checked and counted against your invoice.

05

Standing reorders

Regular buyers move to a recurring schedule, so restocking is a phone call, not a fresh negotiation.
